code:
import io
import string

let t_line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()

mut count = 0
mut tok = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(body)
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  mut cb = 0
  if i < n
    let bv = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
    cb = bv
    if bv == 32 or bv == 9 or bv == 10 or bv == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(tok)
      if tok == t_line
        count = count + 1
      end
      tok = ""
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(cb)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("count=#{count}")
